title: Corrigendum to Gazette notification G.S.R. 310(E) dated 16.03.2016 amended rule 96 of Central Motor Vehicles Rules, 1989 by inserting sub-rule (4A) after sub-rule (4).
description: Corrigendum to Gazette notification G.S.R. 310(E) dated 16.03.2016 amended rule 96 of Central Motor Vehicles Rules, 1989 by inserting sub-rule (4A) after sub-rule (4).
file_title: G.S.R. 683 dtd 12.07.2016 _ Corrigendum_ABS and CBS in 2W.pdf

L.-33004/99 vlk/kj.k EXTRAORDINARY Hkkx II—[k.M 3—mi&[k.M (i) PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) izkf/dkj ls izdkf'kr PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY la- 476] ubZ fnYyh] eaxyokj] tqykbZ 12] 2016@vk"kk<+ 21] 1938 No. 476] NEW DELHI, TUESDAY, JULY 12, 2016/ASADHA 21, 1938 सड़क पᳯरवहन और राजमागᭅ मंᮢ ालय शु ि᳍-पᮢ नई ᳰद᭨ली, 12 जुलाई, 2016 सा.का.िन. 683(अ).—कᱶᮤीय सरकार ने मोटरयान अिधिनयम, 1988 कᳱ धारा 110 ᳇ार ा ᮧद᭜त शि᭍तयᲂ का ᮧयोग करते ᱟए राजपᮢ अिधसूचना सा.का.िन. 310 (अ) ᳰदनांक 16.03.2016 के तहत कᱶᮤीय मोटरयान िनयमावली, 1989 के िनयम 96 मᱶ उप-ि नयम (4) के प᭫चात उप-िनयम (4ए) सि᭥मिलत करते ᱟए संशोधन ᳰक या जाता है । उपयुᭅ᭍त अिधसूचना के ᳲहदी मूलपाठ मᱶ सभी श᭣दᲂ और सं᭎याᲐ “<” के िलए श᭣द और सं᭎याᲐ को “≤” के ᱨप मᱶ पढ़ा जाए तथा उ᭍त उप-िनयम के ᳲहदी मूलपाठ के परंतुक मᱶ “या संयु᭍त ᮩे᳴ कग ᮧणाली” श᭣दᲂ को हटाया जाए । [फा. सं. आरटी-11036/75/2014-एमवीएल] अभय दामले, संयु᭍त सिचव MINISTRY OF ROAD TRANSPORT AND HIGHWAYS CORRIGENDUM New Delhi, the 12th July, 2016. G.S.R. 683(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 110 of the Motor Vehicles Act, 1988, the Central Government vide Gazette notification G.S.R. 310(E) dated 16.03.2016 amended rule 96 of Central Motor Vehicles Rules, 1989 by inserting sub-rule (4A) after sub-rule (4). In the hindi version of the above notification, for all the words and numbers “<”, the word and numbers may be read as “≤” and in the proviso of hindi version of the said sub-rule the words “or combined braking system” shall be deleted. [F. No. RT-11036/75/2014-MVL] ABHAY DAMLE, Jt. Secy. 3478 GI/2016 Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 1 of 1 --
